# Fazlerasheed & Co.

> Fazlerasheed & Co. is a leading importer and dealer of battery operated forklifts, reach trucks, and material handling equipment (MHE) in Pakistan. We deal in the sale and rental of imported equipment, supply lithium and lead-acid traction batteries and spare parts for all major brands, and provide maintenance, battery regeneration, and wheel retreading services. Established with 10+ years of experience and a 200+ machine rental fleet, we are headquartered in Lahore and serve customers across Pakistan.

## Key Facts

- **Business:** Sale and rental of imported battery-operated forklifts and material handling equipment; traction batteries; spare parts; equipment servicing.
- **Experience:** 10+ years in the material handling industry.
- **Rental fleet:** 200+ machines available for short-term and long-term rental.
- **Authorized distributor:** Official Pakistan distributor for EP Equipment (EP Green lithium MHE) and BYD lithium forklifts.
- **Brands served (sales, parts & service):** EP, BYD, Jungheinrich (Germany), Still (Germany), Linde (Germany), Clark (USA), Crown (USA), Yale (USA), Toyota (Japan), BT (Sweden), plus RoyPow, Trojan, Eternity, and Hawker batteries.
- **Head Office:** 328/3 W Block, Street 25, Phase 3, DHA Lahore Cantt, Lahore, Punjab 54810, Pakistan.
- **Site Office:** Coca-Cola Stop, 12 KM Raiwind Road, Lahore, Punjab 54000, Pakistan.
- **Phone:** +92 333 6871970, +92 342 4554488, +92 331 1141062.
- **Email:** info@fazlerasheed.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM (PKT).
- **Area served:** Pakistan nationwide, with location pages for 10 major cities.
- **Social:** [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/fazl-e-rasheed-and-co/), [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/fazlerasheedandco/), [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@fazlerasheedandcompany).

## Main

- [Home](https://fazlerasheed.com/): Company overview, equipment range, and services.
- [Products](https://fazlerasheed.com/products): Full catalog of forklifts and material handling equipment.
- [Batteries](https://fazlerasheed.com/batteries): Lithium and lead-acid traction batteries for MHE.
- [Services](https://fazlerasheed.com/services): Rental, maintenance, battery regeneration, wheel retreading, and golf cart maintenance.
- [Spare Parts](https://fazlerasheed.com/spare-parts): Genuine and aftermarket forklift spare parts for all major brands.
- [Blog](https://fazlerasheed.com/blog): Guides and articles on forklifts and material handling.
- [Contact](https://fazlerasheed.com/contact): Phone, email, and office locations.

## Equipment (Sale & Rental)

- [Forklifts](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/forklifts): Battery-operated and IC counterbalance forklifts, 1.0–5.5 tons, lift up to 7 m.
- [Reach Trucks](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/reach-trucks): Narrow-aisle electric reach trucks, 1.0–2.5 tons, lift up to 12 m.
- [Power Pallets](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/power-pallets): Electric pallet trucks (walkie/rider), 1.5–3.0 tons.
- [Stackers](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/stackers): Electric pallet stackers, 1.0–2.0 tons, lift up to 6 m.
- [Order Pickers](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/order-pickers): Operator-elevating order pickers, pick height up to 12 m.
- [Tow Trucks](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/tow-trucks): Electric tow tractors and tuggers, towing 1.0–25 tons.
- [Hand Pallets](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/hand-pallets): Manual and semi-electric hand pallet jacks, 2.0–3.0 tons.
- [Lithium Batteries](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/lithium-batteries): LiFePO4 traction batteries, 24V–80V, 3,000+ cycle life.
- [Lead-Acid Batteries](https://fazlerasheed.com/products/lead-acid-batteries): Flooded, AGM, and gel traction batteries, 6V–80V.

## Brands

- [BYD](https://fazlerasheed.com/byd): BYD lithium-iron-phosphate powered forklifts and MHE (authorized distributor).
- [EP Equipment](https://fazlerasheed.com/ep): EP Green lithium-ion forklifts, stackers, and pallet trucks (authorized distributor).
- [RoyPow Batteries](https://fazlerasheed.com/batteries/roypow): RoyPow lithium traction batteries.

- [Yale Parts](https://fazlerasheed.com/spare-parts/yale)

Part categories include hydraulic parts, tires & wheels, steering, transmission, brakes, filters, engine parts, electrical parts, chassis parts, cooling parts, attachments, and fuel parts.

## Locations

- [Lahore](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/lahore): Headquarters; serves textile, pharmaceutical, FMCG, and packaging industries.
- [Karachi](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/karachi): Port logistics, automotive, chemical, and food & beverage industries.
- [Islamabad](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/islamabad): Construction, corporate logistics, and government supply.
- [Rawalpindi](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/rawalpindi): Military logistics, heavy engineering, and wholesale trading.
- [Faisalabad](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/faisalabad): Textile mills, dyeing, and garment manufacturing.
- [Multan](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/multan): Fertilizer, ceramics, and agricultural storage.
- [Sialkot](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/sialkot): Sports goods, surgical instruments, and export logistics.
- [Gujranwala](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/gujranwala): Steel re-rolling, ceramics, and electrical goods.
- [Peshawar](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/peshawar): Cross-border trade, construction, and agricultural commodities.
- [Hyderabad](https://fazlerasheed.com/locations/hyderabad): Glass and bangles, textiles, and chemical processing.

## FAQ

**What does Fazlerasheed & Co. do?**
We import, sell, and rent battery-operated forklifts and material handling equipment in Pakistan, and we supply traction batteries and spare parts plus maintenance and repair services for all major brands.

**Do you rent forklifts?**
Yes. We offer short-term and long-term rental from a fleet of 200+ machines, including forklifts, reach trucks, power pallets, stackers, tow trucks, and order pickers, covering seasonal peaks, stock-takes, backlogs, and special projects.

**Which brands do you supply parts and service for?**
EP, BYD, Jungheinrich, Still, Linde, Clark, Crown, Yale, Toyota, and BT. We also supply RoyPow, Trojan, Eternity, and Hawker batteries.

**Where are you located and which areas do you serve?**
Our head office is in DHA Lahore Cantt with a site office on Raiwind Road, Lahore. We serve customers across Pakistan, including Lahore, Karachi, Islamabad, Rawalpindi, Faisalabad, Multan, Sialkot, Gujranwala, Peshawar, and Hyderabad.

**What is the difference between lithium and lead-acid forklift batteries?**
Lithium (LiFePO4) batteries are maintenance-free, support fast opportunity charging, and last 3,000+ cycles (about 3x lead-acid), with a lower total cost of ownership. Lead-acid batteries (flooded, AGM, gel) have a lower upfront cost and suit single-shift operations.

**Do you offer maintenance services?**
Yes. We provide planned maintenance (labor) and full maintenance (parts and labor) with trained engineers, fast response, and a first-call fix rate. We also offer battery regeneration that restores up to 80% capacity, wheel/castor/roller retreading, and golf cart maintenance.

**How much does a forklift cost or cost to rent in Pakistan?**
Pricing depends on the equipment type, brand, load capacity, lift height, power source (lithium, lead-acid, or IC), and whether you buy or rent. Rental is available on flexible short-term and long-term terms. Contact us with your application for a tailored quote.

**Do you sell new forklifts, and do you have used ones?**
We specialize in imported battery-operated forklifts and material handling equipment, available for outright purchase or rental. Tell us your load, lift height, and environment, and we will recommend the right machine from brands like EP, BYD, Jungheinrich, Still, Linde, Toyota, and Yale.

**Is there a warranty on your equipment?**
Yes. Warranty terms vary by product; for example, BYD electric forklifts come with a 10-year battery warranty. Contact us for the specific warranty on the model you are interested in.

**Can I convert my forklift from a lead-acid battery to lithium?**
Yes. Our LiFePO4 lithium traction batteries (24V–80V, 100–690 Ah) are compatible with forklifts, reach trucks, stackers, and power pallets from all major brands. Lithium adds fast opportunity charging, zero maintenance, and 3,000+ cycle life, removing the need for battery swaps.

**What load capacities and lift heights are available?**
Forklifts handle 1.0–5.5 tons with lifts up to 7 m, reach trucks handle 1.0–2.5 tons with lifts up to 12 m, stackers handle 1.0–2.0 tons up to 6 m, and tow tractors tow 1.0–25 tons. Hand and power pallets handle 1.5–3.0 tons.

**How long does a lithium forklift battery take to charge?**
LiFePO4 lithium forklift batteries typically charge in 1–2 hours and support opportunity charging during breaks, so machines can run across multiple shifts without swapping batteries. Lead-acid batteries require longer charging and a cool-down period.

**Why choose battery-operated forklifts over diesel or LPG?**
Battery-operated (electric) forklifts produce zero emissions, run quietly, and have lower operating and maintenance costs than internal-combustion models, making them ideal for indoor warehouses, food, pharmaceutical, and FMCG facilities.

**Do you supply genuine spare parts?**
Yes. We stock genuine and aftermarket/OEM-equivalent spare parts cross-referenced to original part numbers for Jungheinrich, Still, Linde, Clark, Crown, Toyota, BT, Yale, and EP, across categories including hydraulics, electrical, brakes, filters, tires & wheels, engine, transmission, and chassis parts.

**Which forklift is best for narrow-aisle warehouses?**
Reach trucks are designed for narrow-aisle, high-density racking with lift heights over 10 m, while order pickers suit piece-picking at height. For lighter stacking in tight spaces, electric stackers are a compact, cost-effective option.

**What payment methods do you accept?**
We accept cash and bank transfer, priced in Pakistani Rupees (PKR).

**How can I get a quote or contact you?**
Call +92 333 6871970, +92 342 4554488, or +92 331 1141062, email info@fazlerasheed.com, or use the [contact page](https://fazlerasheed.com/contact). Hours are Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 6:00 PM.
